zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John De Pateshull於1291年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾帕迪夏拉爾時，他的父親Simon de Pateshulle Lord of Pateshull and Bletsoe24歲，母親Isabel Stonegrave21歲。他於1312年3月6日與Mabilia Grandison在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1342年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1349年8月7日在英國貝德福爾布勒左享年58歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾可爾德 希加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John De Pateshull于1291年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾帕迪夏拉爾时，他的父亲Simon de Pateshulle Lord of Pateshull and Bletsoe24岁，母亲Isabel Stonegrave21岁。他于1312年3月6日与Mabilia Grandison在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1342年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1349年8月7日在英国貝德福爾布勒左享年58岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾可爾德 希加姆。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John De Pateshull was born in 1291, in Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Simon de Pateshulle Lord of Pateshull and Bletsoe, was 24 and his mother, Isabel Stonegrave, was 21. He married Mabilia Grandison on 6 March 1312, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. In 1342, at the age of 51, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died on 7 August 1349, in Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Cold Higham, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John De Pateshull est né en 1291, à Pattishall, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon de Pateshulle Lord of Pateshull and Bletsoe, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel Stonegrave, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mabilia Grandison le 6 mars 1312, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. En 1342, à l’âge de 51 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé le 7 août 1349, à Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Cold Higham, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John De Pateshull 1291 in Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Pateshulle Lord of Pateshull and Bletsoe 24 und seine Mutter Isabel Stonegrave 21. Er hat am 6. März 1312 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Mabilia Grandison geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. 1342, als er 51 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb am 7. August 1349 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Cold Higham, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John De Pateshull è nato il nel 1291 nel Pattishall, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Simon de Pateshulle Lord of Pateshull and Bletsoe, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Stonegrave, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mabilia Grandison il 6 marzo 1312, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Nel 1342, all'età di 51 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì il 7 agosto 1349, nel Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Cold Higham, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John De Pateshullが1291年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプアッティシャルで生まれた時，父Simon de Pateshulle Lord of Pateshull and Bletsoeは24歳，母Isabel Stonegraveは21歳であった。1312年3月6日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでMabilia Grandisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1342年，51歳の時，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1349年8月7日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアブレトソで58歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコルド ヒガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John De Pateshull(이)가 1291년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 패티샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Pateshulle Lord of Pateshull and Bletsoe(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Stonegrave(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1312년 3월 6일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Mabilia Grandison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1342년, 51세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1349년 8월 7일 영국 베드퍼드실르 블레츠에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 콜드 히아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John De Pateshull nasceu em 1291, em Pattishall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon de Pateshulle Lord of Pateshull and Bletsoe, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Stonegrave, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabilia Grandison em 6 de março de 1312, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Em 1342, com 51 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1349, em Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Cold Higham, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John De Pateshull родился в 1291 г. в местности паттишолл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simon de Pateshulle Lord of Pateshull and Bletsoe было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Stonegrave, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabilia Grandison 6 марта 1312 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. В 1342 году, в возрасте 51 год,  он работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер 7 августа 1349 г. в местности блецо, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности колд хаиам, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John De Pateshull nació en 1291, en Pattishall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon de Pateshulle Lord of Pateshull and Bletsoe, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel Stonegrave, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mabilia Grandison el 6 de marzo de 1312, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. En 1342, a la edad de 51 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1349, en Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Cold Higham, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
